title: Moonstone-Relics
body:
## Moonstone Relics is a plugin that adds Relics compatibility to Moonstone.
### This mod requires Moonstone and Relics as dependencies!

It serves as a medium between two mod, improving the interactivity between mod and matching Moonstone's items with Relics, giving it a leveling system. This mod is still under development and will change more items in the future.

Just like this:

![Giant Zombie](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3b87c70286a16a6bc759cabea0e5a3e79e28383.png)
![Blood Splatter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce621924efaa289b4fe7954af9f8a527f7fb2c0e.png)
